criteria_results.description: File server/db.ts exists and exports `pool` typed as pg.Pool and `db` typed as a Drizzle instance initialised with the schema from shared/schema.ts
criteria_results.evidence: server/db.ts exports both `pool` and `db` (created via drizzle(pool, { schema })) as verified by reading the file.

criteria_results.description: DatabaseStorage in server/databaseStorage.ts implements every method declared in the IStorage interface: getUser, getUserByUsername, createUser, getProject, listProjectsForUser, createProject, updateProject, deleteProject, getProjectState, saveProjectState, saveFile, getFileMeta, getFileBuffer, deleteFile
criteria_results.evidence: server/databaseStorage.ts contains all 14 method implementations with signatures matching IStorage. TypeScript compilation passed.

criteria_results.description: DatabaseStorage.getProject and listProjectsForUser return Project objects with sharedWith populated from the project_shares table, not hardcoded as []
criteria_results.evidence: In server/databaseStorage.ts, both methods use leftJoin with projectShares and aggregate the resulting sharedUserId values into the sharedWith array.

criteria_results.description: DatabaseStorage.saveProjectState updates the state JSONB column in the projects table (not a file), and also updates updatedAt
criteria_results.evidence: Implementation in server/databaseStorage.ts uses db.update(projects).set({ state, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() }).

criteria_results.description: DatabaseStorage.createProject wraps its INSERT inside a db.transaction() call
criteria_results.evidence: Implementation in server/databaseStorage.ts uses return await db.transaction(async (tx) => { ... }) and performs the insert via the tx parameter.

criteria_results.description: server/auth.ts no longer imports or references memorystore or MemoryStore; the session store is a connect-pg-simple instance constructed with the shared pg pool
criteria_results.evidence: server/auth.ts uses connect-pg-simple and initializes PostgresStore with the pool and createTableIfMissing: true. No memorystore imports present.

criteria_results.description: server/storage.ts exports DatabaseStorage as the default storage instance; when STORAGE_TYPE=file is set it exports FileStorage instead
criteria_results.evidence: server/storage.ts uses process.env.STORAGE_TYPE === 'file' ? new FileStorage() : new DatabaseStorage() to determine the storage instance.

criteria_results.description: TypeScript compilation of the server passes without errors after the changes
criteria_results.evidence: Ran npx tsc --noEmit and it returned with exit code 0 and no output errors.

suggestions: Consider removing 'memorystore' from package.json since it's no longer used in the server code.
DatabaseStorage.listProjectsForUser could be optimized to use a single query with subqueries or OR conditions instead of three separate selects.
